EmailTemplate.description: Recap email sent to Admin after an user has created and saved a log
EmailTemplate.name: Easy Log : Email sent to Admin after a record is saved by user
EmailTemplate.subject: New Easy Log from {!Bug_Log__c.CreatedBy}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello Team !
{!Bug_Log__c.CreatedBy} says that :
"{!Bug_Log__c.Type__c} on {!Bug_Log__c.App__c} related to the {!Bug_Log__c.Object__c}"
To be more precised, "{!Bug_Log__c.Description__c}
Can you check for me, please ?
It is {!Bug_Log__c.PrioritySeverity__c} and according to me it should be resolved on {!Bug_Log__c.Expected_Date__c}."
Team, please go to Easy Log and check for the {!Bug_Log__c.Name} to resolve {!Bug_Log__c.CreatedBy} 's issue.
Follow the link : https://carmignac-crm--uatmycrm.lightning.force.com/one/one.app?source=alohaHeader#/sObject/{!Bug_Log__c.Id}/view
And do not forget to Assigned the request to you, if you decide to resolve it :-)
Good Luck !
